earthrise: the black empty space around the planet
the blue and white round Earth near the upper center
the gray cratered lunar surface across the bottom
migrant-mother: the flat dark cloth backdrop behind the figures
the central seated woman with face and hands visible
the two children leaning against the woman on both sides
starry-night: the dark blue swirling sky with yellow stars
the tall dark cypress tree on the left
the small village and hills along the bottom
girl-pearl-earring: the plain dark solid black background area around the figure
the entire head and face of the girl including skin hair headscarf forehead cheeks chin eyes nose and mouth
the large white teardrop shaped pearl earring hanging below the ear
the brown and yellow clothing collar and garment visible below the neck
water-lilies: the blue purple water surface with sky reflections
the white and pink water lily blossoms
the round green lily pads floating on the water
great-wave: the pale sky and small white mountain near the center
the large blue curling wave with claw-like white foam tips
the smaller dark blue waves and water surface at the bottom
qingming-bridge: the rows of buildings and trees behind the river
the arched bridge crowded with small people near the center
the river and boats below the bridge
padmapani: the dark painted wall behind the figure
the large central human figure with tilted head and bare torso
the bright jewelry and flower ornament near the upper body
mona-lisa: the distant sfumato landscape behind the seated woman including hazy mountains winding roads rivers and atmospheric sky
the entire head and face of the woman including hair veil forehead cheeks chin eyes nose and mouth
the dark greenish-brown dress covering the torso and sleeves including gold embroidery at the neckline
only the bare skin of the two folded hands and fingers visible in the lower center
the stone parapet ledge and dark wooden chair arm at the bottom edge of the painting
nighthawks: the dark empty street buildings and night sky outside the diner
the large curved plate-glass window and green metal frame of the diner
the bright interior of the diner including back wall counter ceiling lights and equipment
all four human figures inside the diner including the couple on the left the lone man on the right and the server behind the counter
the sidewalk stools cups and small objects on the counter in front of the diner
cash register and service area forms near the right side behind the counter
the-scream: the swirling orange and red sky and the dark blue fjord water and distant hills
the diagonal brown wooden bridge or boardwalk including railings and deck planks
the entire central screaming figure including the bald head open mouth dark robe body and hands pressed to the sides of the head
the two dark silhouetted figures walking away in the upper left
the small dark boats visible on the water below
